creator: rockyhotas@post.com
text:
Created attachment 229492
Correction of rcorder(8) typo.

In the rcorder(8) manpage, `EXAMPLES' section, there's a mismatch between the actual command and its description. 

``which specify the shutdown keyword'' should be modified into ``which specify the nostart keyword''. The result of the command, `3', is referred to `nostart'.

A diff with the possible correction is attached.
